docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $753.48 FILED BY ROSSI LOUIS C IND DBA ROSSI DISTRIBUTING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ELHAM H AND HANNA F DAHDAH  IND DBA DIVISADERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
